lines.text: Bump, set and spike your way to fun at any of 8 sand courts found at Walt Disney World Resort hotels.

Rally your crew for a no-holds-barred match or just bat a ball around and make the most of the beach. Well-groomed, white-sand courts can be found at 8 locations throughout Walt Disney World Resort, and a water volleyball court at Walt Disney World Dolphin Hotel allows you to hammer it down the line while playing it cool.

Any Guest of a Walt Disney World Resort hotel may access the volleyball courts, and equipment can be obtained using a valid Resort ID. Disney Vacation Club members may check out equipment free of charge; for all other Guests, an associated fee applies.
Courts are found at the following locations:
Disney's Caribbean Beach Resort — Sand court at Martinique Village; check out equipment at Barefoot Bay Bike Works
Disney's Contemporary Resort — Sand court on the beach; check out equipment at Boat Nook Marina
Disney's Coronado Springs Resort — Sand court near Dig Site pool; check out equipment at Siesta's pool bar
Disney's Old Key West Resort — Sand court near Hospitality House; check out equipment at Hank's Rent 'N Return
Disney's Polynesian Village Resort — Sand court on the beach; check out equipment at Seven Seas Marina
Disney's Yacht & Beach Club Resorts — Sand court near Tidal Pool; check out equipment at Ship Shape Massage Salon Fitness
The Campsites at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort — Sand court in the Meadow Recreation Area; check out equipment at the Bike Barn
Walt Disney World Dolphin and Swan Hotels — Sand court on the beach, wet court in grotto pool; check out equipment at Dolphin Health Club or Swan Health Club
